description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious wooden deck that wraps around the front and side of the building. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The interior is open-plan, with visible kitchen, dining, and living areas, and the furnishings are minimalistic and contemporary. Adjacent to the bungalow is a uniquely shaped in-ground swimming pool with a light stone border. The exterior walls are predominantly white, and the deck is bordered by a white railing. Two lounge chairs are placed on the deck, emphasizing the recreational and relaxing atmosphere of the property.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, expansive glass windows, a large wooden deck, and an adjacent swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-plan interior, large glass windows, wooden deck with lounge chairs, and the swimming pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the deck, the glass facade, and the pool positioned to the left of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid white back wall with minimal windows and doors, and the pool directly behind the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck extending along the side, the pool to the right, and the rear entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped front-facing windows
